# Copilot Custom Instructions

## About Me
- Software Developer
- Main languages: Python, TypeScript, Go
- Focus on clean code, testing, and automation

## Coding Preferences
- Prefer functional programming patterns when appropriate
- Use type hints/annotations always
- Write self-documenting code with minimal comments
- Follow SOLID principles
- Prefer composition over inheritance

## Project Context
- Check 01-Projects/ for active project documentation
- Check 02-Areas/Development/ for coding standards
- Check 03-Resources/ for language/framework references

## Code Style
- Python: PEP 8, black formatter, ruff linter
- TypeScript: ESLint, Prettier
- Always include error handling
- Write unit tests for new functions
